feature_map.raw: Re-spin feature when numbers are marked with 'Spin' symbol - they lock in place and other reels re-spin for chance to increase cash awards
feature_map.reason: This is a simple respin mechanic where symbols happen to stay, not a dedicated Hold and Spin bonus with lock-grid-respin-counter mechanics. Does not meet H&S definition which requires BOTH explicit locking AND a counter that resets on new locks.
